meta_title: Cafe Website — Create Online in 5 Minutes | Promto
meta_description: Create a cafe website with menu, photos, and location. Promto AI builder helps attract new guests without coders or designers.
og_description: Create a cafe website with menu and online reservations. Promto AI builder — professional results in minutes.
hero_subtitle: Show guests your menu, atmosphere, and location — create a website in 5 minutes.
hero_placeholder: Describe the website for your business...

advantages.title: In 5 Minutes
advantages.description: Describe your cafe — AI will generate a ready website with design and texts.

advantages.title: Cozy Design
advantages.description: Atmospheric templates for cafes with galleries of dishes, drinks, and interior.

advantages.title: Menu with Prices
advantages.description: Publish your menu online — update dishes and prices in just a few clicks.

advantages.title: Reservations
advantages.description: Guests book through the website — you receive a notification by email or phone.

advantages.title: Visible in Search
advantages.description: SEO optimization helps your cafe appear in Google and Yandex for queries in your city.

advantages.title: Safe and Reliable
advantages.description: SSL, fast hosting, and 24/7 stable operation — everything included.

how_it_works.title: Tell Us About Your Cafe
how_it_works.description: Enter the name, concept, and highlights — AI will understand everything on its own.

how_it_works.title: Get a Ready Website
how_it_works.description: AI will create the structure, write texts, and select design in seconds.

how_it_works.title: Edit and Launch
how_it_works.description: Add photos, adjust the menu, and click Publish.

faq.question: Can I display the cafe menu on the website?
faq.answer: Yes, you can add a full menu with dishes, descriptions, prices, and photos. Updates are simple — no developer needed.

faq.question: How will the website help attract new guests?
faq.answer: The website appears in search engines — people find your cafe when searching by city or cuisine type. This is free customer flow.

faq.question: Do I need a designer or programmer?
faq.answer: No. Promto AI creates the website automatically — you only need to describe the cafe and upload photos.

faq.question: Can I add a map and address?
faq.answer: Yes, you can embed a map showing your cafe location — guests will immediately see how to get there.

faq.question: How much does a cafe website cost?
faq.answer: You can create a website for free. Paid plans are available for custom domain and advanced features.

faq.question: Does the website work on mobile devices?
faq.answer: Yes, all Promto websites are responsive — they look great on smartphones, tablets, and computers.

cta_mid_subtitle: AI will do everything for you — describe your cafe and get a ready website.
cta_final_title: Guests Are Already Looking for Your Cafe Online
cta_final_subtitle: Create a website in 5 minutes and start attracting guests online.
